title: VS ChunkLoader
description: Valkyrien Skies compatible chunk loader, automate your ship now!
body:
Valkyrien Skies compatible chunk loader.

Control your ship from thousands blocks away! Even In different dimensions!

This mod adds two balanced chunk loaders, both can load your Valkyrien Skies' ship.

The regular version can keep your ship loading permanently as long as you provide enough energy.

The weaker version is same as the regular version, but it has cheaper recipe and will self-destroy after activated for one minute, which best suits for custom weapons work beyond view distance (such as railgun ammo, missle).

`/vschunkloader` command also allow you force load ships.
